---
title: ""
pagetitle: "Travel"
description: "Fieldwork, conferences, and a love of Argentina — travel notes and photographs. (Private personal-projects page.)"
format:
  html:
    toc: false
    page-layout: full
    include-in-header: _personal-head.html
---

::: {.section-label}
Personal projects
:::
# travel {.section-title}

Fieldwork takes me to lakes and rivers; the rest is curiosity. A deep and standing love of Argentina runs through it all. Travel logs and photos will collect here.

::: {.log}

::: {.log-entry}
### Argentina
[A yearly return]{.log-meta}
The trip I look forward to most. Notes and photographs to come.
:::

:::

::: {.personal-link}
*More logs coming soon.* &nbsp; · &nbsp; [← Back to personal projects](personal.html)
:::
